description: Populated dashboard deck: the readiness hero above the vitals, coach-transmission, and field-log info row. Pure layout composition driven by the console.
name: BriefingDeck

description: Populated dashboard deck: the readiness hero above a three-panel info row (vitals, coach transmission, field log). Pure layout composition driven by the console.
name: BriefingDeck

description: Daily-briefing entry detail: readiness label + score kicker, the serif verdict headline, status line, and the coach transmission with its signature.
name: BriefingDetail

description: Daily-briefing entry detail: readiness label + score kicker, serif verdict headline, status line, and the coach transmission with its signature.
name: BriefingDetail

description: The Daily Check-in surface: a morning/evening check-in form that writes a Mood row (also read by the Activity Timeline) above the trailing check-in history.
name: CheckinConsole

description: The Daily Check-in surface: a morning/evening check-in form plus the recent-check-ins history, owning the selected part of day.
name: CheckinConsole

description: Quiet empty state for the recent-check-ins history: a mono bracket label plus a line of plain-language copy, shown under the form on day one.
name: CheckinEmpty

description: Quiet empty state for the recent-check-ins history, shown under the form on day one before any check-in has been logged.
name: CheckinEmpty

description: The daily check-in form: a morning/evening toggle, a mood word, four 1-5 rating scales, and a reflection note; submitting is the surface's primary interaction (submitCheckin action).
name: CheckinForm

description: The daily check-in form: a part-of-day toggle, a mood word, four 1-5 rating scales, and a note; validates and submits a Mood row, owning field and pending/error state.
name: CheckinForm

description: The /checkin route: server component that loads recent Mood rows and renders the CheckinConsole, defaulting the part of day from the URL or the current time. force-dynamic so a new check-in shows immediately.
name: CheckinPage

description: One entry in the recent-check-ins history: date + part of day on the left, and the mood word, a rolled-up wellbeing score, and the note on the right.
name: CheckinRow

description: One recent-check-in history entry: the date and part of day, the mood word, a rolled-up wellbeing score, and the note.
name: CheckinRow

description: The ⌘K coach entry point rendered as a right-side slide-in panel; in this build it is a stub confirming the entry point works ahead of the full context-aware coach.
name: CoachDock

description: The coach's single observant note, its directive, and the local-model signature; renders a quiet empty label when there is no transmission yet.
name: CoachTransmission

description: Coach transmission block: one observant note (with emphasis markup), its directive, and a local-model signature, or a quiet empty label when there is no transmission yet.
name: CoachTransmission

description: CodeYam-scaffolded layout guard for isolated-component preview routes; notFound in production.
name: CodeYamIsolateLayout

untestabilityReason.justification: CodeYam isolation-preview scaffold, not product code.

description: A titled group of provider rows in the Connections panel; when interactive, a row toggles open the plain-language connect flow.
name: ConnectionsGroup

description: The Set Up surface: a slide-in dock with an AI-coach group and a health-data group, plus a day-one fresh mode that shows every provider as available.
name: ConnectionsPanel

description: The instrument coordinates strip under the dial; drops entries with no value and renders nothing when none remain.
name: CoordStrip

description: Instrument coordinates strip beneath the dial (labelled readouts like ELEV/WIND/WINDOW); drops entries with no value and renders nothing when none remain.
name: CoordStrip

description: Client composer for the whole briefing console: renders the metabar plus the readiness hero, vitals, coach transmission, and field log when a briefing exists, or the day-one onboarding state when it does not; owns the coach-dock open state and the ⌘K shortcut.
name: DashboardConsole

description: The Wellframe dashboard Daily Briefing Console (desktop port): composes the metabar with either the populated briefing deck or the day-one onboarding empty state when there is no briefing yet.
name: DashboardConsole

description: A label/value pair in an entry detail's stat row (distance, pace, vertical, duration).
name: DetailStat

description: A label/value pair in an entry detail's stat row (distance, pace, ...), with timeline-specific styling.
name: DetailStat

description: Day-one onboarding state (production default, empty DB): the console frame with a muted dial, a serif prompt, and bracket-labeled connect-a-source options.
name: EmptyBriefing

description: Day-one onboarding state (production default on an empty database): the onboarding lead plus a numbered two-step setup (connect AI coach, connect health source) routing into the Connections panel.
name: EmptyBriefing

description: The detail surface for a single timeline entry: frames the metabar + section header + back link and dispatches to the per-kind detail component (workout / mood / weight / briefing).
name: EntryDetail

description: The detail surface for a single timeline entry: frames a numbered section with a back link and dispatches to the per-kind detail component (workout/mood/weight/briefing).
name: EntryDetail

description: Route for a single timeline entry's detail (/timeline/<kind>-<id>): server component that loads the row via getTimelineEntry and renders EntryDetail, or 404s on a malformed id or missing row.
name: EntryDetailPage

description: Yesterday's logged activity: grayscale photo plate plus title and distance/pace/vertical stats; shows its own empty label when nothing was logged.
name: FieldLog

description: Field Log panel for yesterday's logged activity: a grayscale photo plate beside title and distance/pace/vertical stats, or a quiet empty label when nothing was logged.
name: FieldLog

description: One goal as a hairline-bordered row: progress ring, title + metric + progress read, and cadence/due; a completed goal shows a mint ring and a Complete badge.
name: GoalCard

description: One goal as a hairline-bordered row: progress ring, title + metric + progress read, and cadence/due; a completed goal shows a mint ring and a Complete badge.
name: GoalCard

description: The create-a-goal composer: a slide-in panel with the new-goal form (title, category, metric, target/current/unit, cadence); submitting calls the createGoal action.
name: GoalComposer

description: The create-a-goal composer: a slide-in panel with the new-goal form (title, category, metric, target/current/unit, cadence) that validates the fields with validateGoalInput and persists via the createGoal action.
name: GoalComposer

description: A goal progress ring: hairline track plus a stroked arc encoding completion, with the whole-number percentage centred; mint when complete, signal-blue while in progress.
name: GoalRing

description: A goal progress ring: hairline track plus a stroked arc encoding completion with the whole-number percentage centred; mint when complete, signal-blue while in progress.
name: GoalRing

description: The Goals surface: lists tracked goals as progress cards and opens a slide-in composer to create a new goal (the primary interaction). Shows an empty state that opens straight into the composer on day one.
name: GoalsConsole

description: The Goals surface (desktop port): lists tracked goals as progress cards and opens a slide-in composer to create a new goal, owning the composer open state and showing a day-one empty state that opens straight into the composer.
name: GoalsConsole

description: Day-one empty state for the Goals surface: serif verdict and the primary + New goal call to action that opens the composer.
name: GoalsEmpty

description: Day-one empty state for the Goals surface: serif verdict, plain-language copy, and the primary + New goal call to action that opens the composer.
name: GoalsEmpty

description: The /goals route: server component that loads every Goal and renders the GoalsConsole, reading the composer-open state (?new=1) from the URL. force-dynamic so a newly created goal shows immediately.
name: GoalsPage

description: Dashboard entry-point page (route /). Server component that loads the current briefing, vitals, and workout via getDashboard and renders the DashboardConsole; shows the day-one empty state when the DB is empty.

description: A quiet in-place expand-for-plain-language toggle: a mono bracket button revealing explanatory content below a hairline.
name: InfoDisclosure

description: Quiet in-place expand/collapse disclosure (mono bracket toggle, no chevron) that reveals plain-language explanatory content below a hairline; used to de-jargon the readiness directive.
name: InfoDisclosure

description: Plinth three-zone metadata bar: WELLFRAME brand, the 'Daily Briefing · Console' subject, and a timestamp with the mint LOCAL LINK status dot that signals the local-first, no-cloud posture.
name: Metabar

description: Plinth three-zone metadata bar: brand left, page subject center, and on the right nav links, timestamp, a LOCAL LINK status dot, and an optional Set Up affordance.
name: Metabar

description: The connect-method options for a provider (browser sign-in vs paste key vs local endpoint), shown when a provider supports more than one; the selected option is highlighted.
name: MethodChooser

description: The per-method connect form: a plain-language hint, an optional API-key/endpoint input, an inline error, and the submit button. Presentational; the parent owns state.
name: MethodForm

description: Check-in entry detail: the morning/evening mood word plus its 1-5 self-ratings (energy, sleep, soreness, stress) and the optional reflection note.
name: MoodDetail

description: Check-in entry detail: the morning/evening mood word plus its 1-5 self-ratings (energy, sleep, soreness, stress) and the optional reflection note.
name: MoodDetail

description: The lead block of the day-one onboarding state: the no-data placeholder dial, headline, and privacy-first intro copy.
name: OnboardLead

description: Lead block of the day-one onboarding state: the no-data placeholder dial, the headline, and the privacy-first intro copy.
name: OnboardLead

description: One numbered setup step in the onboarding state: index, title/body, and a Connect button routing into the Connections panel.
name: OnboardStep

description: One numbered setup step in the day-one onboarding state: index, title/body, and a Connect button that routes into the Connections panel.
name: OnboardStep

description: The expanded connect area beneath an available provider row; owns the connect state machine and composes MethodChooser (when there's a choice) with MethodForm.
name: ProviderConnectPanel

description: One provider line: name and blurb on the left, and either a connected status pill or a Connect/Cancel button on the right.
name: ProviderRow

description: The right-aligned connection status indicator on a provider row: signal dot + status-line detail when connected/synced, or a warning-colored label on error.
name: ProviderStatusPill

description: A 1-5 self-rating from a check-in rendered as five ticks with the filled ones in signal ink; renders nothing when the value is absent.
name: Rating

description: A 1-5 self-rating from a check-in rendered as five ticks with the filled ones in signal ink; renders nothing when the value is absent.
name: Rating

description: One 1-5 rating row in the check-in form: a label, five toggle ticks, and the word for the current value; reused for energy, sleep, soreness, and stress.
name: RatingScale

description: One 1-5 rating row in the check-in form: a label, five toggle ticks, and the word for the current value; reused for energy, sleep, soreness, and stress.
name: RatingScale

description: The readiness instrument dial: a tick-marked bezel with a score-derived arc and the centered numeric readout.
name: ReadinessDial

description: Readiness instrument dial: a fixed tick-marked bezel with a score arc whose length is derived from the score (via ./dial geometry), plus the centered numeric readout.
name: ReadinessDial

description: Left instrument hero: the readiness dial (arc length derived from the score), the elevation/wind/window coordinates strip, the serif verdict headline, and the suggested-workout + query-coach actions.
name: ReadinessHero

description: Left instrument hero: assembles the readiness dial, the coordinates strip, and the serif verdict, preparing the coordinate rows from the briefing.
name: ReadinessHero

description: The serif verdict block under the dial: headline, status line, action buttons, and the what-does-this-mean disclosure for the suggested session.
name: ReadinessVerdict

description: Serif verdict block under the dial: headline (with emphasis markup), status line, the suggested-workout and Query-coach buttons, and the plain-language disclosure for the suggested session.
name: ReadinessVerdict

description: One suggested-recovery-action row in the Recovery Center: kind, title, and optional duration; expands to reveal why it's suggested.
name: RecoveryActionRow

description: One suggested-recovery-action row in the Recovery Center: kind, title, and optional duration; expands to reveal why it's suggested. Pure presentational; open state and toggle owned by RecoveryConsole.
name: RecoveryActionRow

description: The Recovery Center surface: a recovery-score instrument on the left, contributing factors and suggested actions on the right, each row expandable to reveal a plain-language read (the primary interaction). Shows the empty state on day one.
name: RecoveryConsole

description: The Recovery Center surface: a recovery-score instrument (RecoveryHero) beside expandable contributing-factor and suggested-action rows, or the day-one empty state when there is no read. Owns which factor/action rows are open and resolves ?factor=/?action= deep-link positions to open on first render.
name: RecoveryConsole

description: Day-one empty state for the Recovery Center: serif verdict and the connect-a-source / see-trends entry paths.
name: RecoveryEmpty

description: Day-one empty state for the Recovery Center: serif verdict, plain-language explanatory copy, and the connect-a-source / see-trends entry paths. Pure presentational.
name: RecoveryEmpty

description: One contributing-signal row in the Recovery Center: label, track bar, formatted value, and state (strong/steady/strained); expands to reveal a plain-language read.
name: RecoveryFactorRow

description: One contributing-signal row in the Recovery Center: label, track bar, formatted value, and state (strong/steady/strained); expands to reveal a plain-language read. Pure presentational; open state and toggle owned by RecoveryConsole.
name: RecoveryFactorRow

description: The left instrument panel of the Recovery Center: the recovery-score dial (reusing the readiness-dial geometry), score + label, a signals-strong coordinates strip, and the serif verdict + summary.
name: RecoveryHero

description: Left instrument panel of the Recovery Center: the recovery-score dial (reusing the readiness-dial geometry), the score and label, a signals-strong coordinates strip with status line, and the serif verdict plus summary. Pure presentational.
name: RecoveryHero

description: The /recovery route: server component that loads the most-recent RecoveryRead with its factors and actions and renders the RecoveryConsole, reading which factor/action row is expanded from the URL. force-dynamic.
name: RecoveryPage

description: Next.js root layout: sets the Manrope/JetBrains Mono font variables on html and forwards children.
name: RootLayout

untestabilityReason.justification: Next.js framework root-layout shell that wires fonts and forwards children.

description: CodeYam-scaffolded route that reads a scenario file and redirects to its target URL; notFound in production.
name: ScenarioRedirectPage

untestabilityReason.justification: CodeYam scenario-redirect scaffold, not product code.

description: Presentational label/value pair used inside the Field Log stats row.
name: Stat

description: Presentational label/value pair used inside the Field Log stats row.
name: Stat

description: The Activity Timeline surface (client): owns the active type chip + search query (seeded from the URL), derives the chip set from the data, filters the day groups, and renders the filters + days, with quiet empty and no-match states.
name: Timeline

description: The Activity Timeline surface (desktop port): owns the active type chip + search query, derives the chip set, filters the day groups, and renders the filters + days, with day-one and no-match quiet states.
name: Timeline

description: A single day group: a serif date header with an entry-count bracket, followed by that day's TimelineEntry rows.
name: TimelineDay

description: A single day group in the timeline: a date header with label + entry-count bracket followed by that day's entries.
name: TimelineDay

description: The timeline's day-one empty state (the production default before any activity syncs): a numbered section and a short serif line, no illustration.
name: TimelineEmpty

description: The timeline's day-one empty state shown before any activity has synced: a numbered section and a short serif line.
name: TimelineEmpty

description: One timeline row, rendered by kind: a workout carries a grayscale photo plate, while briefing / mood / weight render compact rows with a colored rail dot. The whole row links to the entry's detail view.
name: TimelineEntry

description: One timeline row rendered by kind: workouts carry a grayscale photo plate, other kinds render as compact instrument rows with a mono time gutter and bracket kind label (detail routing deferred).
name: TimelineEntry

description: The timeline filter row: toggleable type chips plus a mono search box (controlled by the Timeline parent). The active chip flips to ink.
name: TimelineFilters

description: The timeline filter row: a controlled set of type chips plus a mono search box, with the active chip flipped to ink.
name: TimelineFilters

description: Entry-point route for the Activity Timeline (/timeline): server component that loads the day-grouped feed via getTimeline and reads the initial type/search filter from the URL, then renders the Timeline surface. force-dynamic so it reflects the current per-scenario DB state.
name: TimelinePage

description: A single trend chart: a soft-filled sparkline over a hairline baseline, with the metric label, latest value + delta, x-axis bucket labels, and a one-line read. Geometry from the pure trends helpers; mint line when improving, signal-blue when declining.
name: TrendChart

description: The Weekly/Monthly/Yearly switcher for the Trends surface (the primary interaction); disables ranges with no data so the user never lands on a blank view.
name: TrendRangeSwitcher

description: The Trends surface: loads every metric chart and a Weekly/Monthly/Yearly range switcher that re-scopes which charts render (the primary interaction). Shows the day-one empty state when there is no history.
name: TrendsConsole

description: Day-one empty state for the Trends surface: serif verdict, plain-language copy, and the connect-a-source / view-timeline entry paths.
name: TrendsEmpty

description: The /trends route: server component that loads every TrendMetric with its points and renders the TrendsConsole, reading the initial range from the URL. force-dynamic so it reflects the current per-scenario DB state.
name: TrendsPage

description: Overnight vitals telemetry: one row per metric with a label, a mint/blue track bar, and a formatted value with optional unit and trend chip; shows a quiet empty label when no readings exist.
name: VitalsPanel

description: Overnight vitals telemetry rows: each a label, a track bar (mint when favorable, signal-blue otherwise), and a formatted value with optional unit and trend chip; fewer rows renders the partial-data state.
name: VitalsPanel

description: Body-weight entry detail: the reading in large tabular type plus its trend delta (mint for a good move, signal-blue otherwise).
name: WeightDetail

description: Body-weight entry detail: the reading in large tabular type plus its trend delta versus the previous reading.
name: WeightDetail

description: Workout entry detail: grayscale photo plate plus the full distance / pace / vertical / duration stat set, falling back to a one-line summary when a workout has no discrete stats.
name: WorkoutDetail

description: Workout entry detail: grayscale photo plate plus the full distance/pace/vertical/duration stat set, falling back to a one-line summary when no discrete stats exist.
name: WorkoutDetail

description: Human label for a suggested-recovery-action kind (run/rest/mobility/hydration/walk/nutrition); title-cases an unknown kind, falls back to 'Action' for empty.
name: actionKindLabel

description: Human label for a suggested-action kind; unknown kinds title-case the raw value as a fallback.
name: actionKindLabel

description: Returns the active-coach view among merged provider views, or null when none is active.
name: activeCoach

description: Tauri command returning native runtime details (name, version, tauri version, OS) so the shell can prove the React-Rust IPC bridge is live.
name: app_info

untestabilityReason.justification: Tauri command exposing native runtime info; not unit-testable without the runtime.

description: Resolves a daily briefing's timeline timestamp from its stored date: a bare YYYY-MM-DD is placed at 07:00 so it sorts among morning entries, a full ISO datetime passes through unchanged.
name: briefingOccurredAt

description: A briefing's timeline timestamp is its ISO `date`; when only a bare date is stored, place it at 07:00 so it sorts among the morning entries.
name: briefingOccurredAt

description: Maps an ordered list of numeric values to SVG line + area path geometry inside a padded box, handling empty, single-point, and flat series without NaN coordinates.
name: buildChartGeometry

description: Map an ordered list of numeric values to SVG coordinates inside a width×height box with `pad` inset on every edge. The y-axis is inverted (SVG origin is top-left) and the value range is padded by 8% so the line never touches the frame. A flat series (min === max) plots on the vertical centre. A single point sits at the horizontal centre. Empty input yields an empty geometry rather than NaN coordinates.
name: buildChartGeometry

description: Pure normalizer for the Activity Timeline: maps the four raw source arrays (workouts, briefings, moods, weights) into TimelineEntry rows (skipping workouts with no occurredAt) and groups them into newest-first days. All shaping the server loader delegates lives here.
name: buildTimeline

description: Normalize the four raw source arrays into TimelineEntry rows and group them into newest-first days. Pure — the server loader (app/lib/timeline.ts) reads the rows via Prisma and delegates all shaping here. A workout with no occurredAt is skipped (it exists only for the dashboard's latest-by-id read).
name: buildTimeline

description: Returns the arc length (2 pi r) of the readiness dial ring for a given radius, defaulting to the design's 176px ring; used for both the dash array and the dash offset.
name: circumference

description: Arc length of the dial ring for a given radius (defaults to the design's 176px ring). Used for both stroke-dasharray and the offset computation.
name: circumference

description: Clamps a vitals track-fill percentage into the renderable 0-100 range so a stray seed value cannot overflow the bar; NaN degrades to 0.
name: clampPct

description: Clamp a track-fill percentage into the renderable [0, 100] range so a stray seed value can't overflow the bar; NaN degrades to 0.
name: clampPct

description: Clamps a raw 1-5 self-rating to an integer in [1,5]; missing/blank/sub-1 becomes null (not rated), high values clamp to 5.
name: clampRating

description: Clamp a raw rating to the integer range [1, 5]. Anything missing / NaN / out-of-range on the low side becomes null (not rated); high values clamp to 5.
name: clampRating

description: Server Action: resolves a connect attempt (via resolveConnection) then upserts the ProviderConnection row and revalidates the dashboard. Returns ok or an inline error.
name: connectProvider

untestabilityReason.justification: Server Action performing Prisma upsert + revalidatePath; the pure decision logic is resolveConnection, which is unit-tested

description: Server Action: validates a new-goal submission (via validateGoalInput), creates the Goal row at the end of the list, and revalidates /goals. The pure decision logic is validateGoalInput, which is unit-tested.
name: createGoal

untestabilityReason.justification: Server Action performing Prisma create + revalidatePath; decision logic is validateGoalInput, unit-tested.

description: Persists a validated new goal via the create_goal Tauri command and emits wf:data-changed on success; a no-op in the browser preview.
name: createGoal

untestabilityReason.justification: Wraps the Tauri create_goal invoke and event dispatch; only exercises under the native runtime.

description: Write command: opens the app-data DB and persists an already-validated new goal.
name: create_goal

untestabilityReason.justification: Tauri command that opens the app-data SQLite DB.

description: Routing helper that returns the current window.location.pathname when it maps to a known route, falling back to '/' otherwise.
name: currentPath

untestabilityReason.justification: reads window.location to pick the active route

description: Returns the UTC calendar-date key (YYYY-MM-DD) of an ISO datetime, used to group timeline entries into days deterministically regardless of render timezone.
name: dayKey

description: Calendar-date key of an ISO datetime, e.g. "2026-07-06T07:14:00Z" -> "2026-07-06". Uses the UTC date so grouping is deterministic and independent of the render machine's timezone (scenarios must screenshot identically anywhere).
name: dayKey

description: Whole days between two YYYY-MM-DD date keys (a minus b), computed from the UTC calendar date; the internal basis for relativeDayLabel Today/Yesterday math.
name: daysBetween

description: Whole days between two date keys (a - b), computed from the UTC calendar date.
name: daysBetween

description: Reads the ?factor= / ?action= URL params into 1-based factor/action row positions to open on first render, ignoring non-finite values.
name: deepLinks

untestabilityReason.justification: Reads window.location.search from the browser DOM; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Builds the timeline filter-chip set from the entry kinds actually present in the data: leads with an All chip, lists known kinds in CHIP_ORDER order, and appends any unexpected filterKey so nothing in the feed is unreachable by the filters.
name: deriveChips

description: Build the filter chip set from the entry kinds actually present in the data. Always leads with an "All" chip; known kinds appear in CHIP_ORDER order, and any unexpected filterKey still gets a chip so nothing in the feed is unreachable by the filters.
name: deriveChips

description: Server Action: deletes a provider's ProviderConnection row and revalidates the dashboard.
name: disconnectProvider

untestabilityReason.justification: Server Action performing a Prisma delete + revalidatePath; no branching logic to unit-test

description: Escapes HTML in a briefing string and converts *word* spans into word, so a headline or coach message can italicize one phrase safely (escaping runs before emphasis so injected markup stays inert).
name: emphasize

description: Pure formatting helpers for the briefing console. No DB, fs, or secret imports — safe anywhere in the client bundle. Escape HTML, then turn *word* spans into word. Lets a briefing headline or coach message italicize one phrase (serif emphasis) while any author/seed-supplied markup stays inert. Escaping runs BEFORE emphasis so an injected tag cannot survive as live markup.
name: emphasize

description: Predicate driving the timeline's type chips and search box: an entry passes when the active type chip matches its filterKey (empty/'all' matches everything) AND the query substring-matches its title, summary, or accent case-insensitively.
name: entryMatchesFilter

description: Does an entry pass the active type chip + search box? An empty `type` (or "all") matches every kind; the query matches case-insensitively across the title, summary, and accent.
name: entryMatchesFilter

description: Tallies how many of a recovery read's contributing factors are 'strong' out of the total, for the coordinates strip.
name: factorTally

description: "2 of 6 signals strong" — a one-line read of how many contributing factors are in good shape. Returns { strong, total } for the caller to format.
name: factorTally

description: Looks up a catalog provider by id across the combined AI + health provider list; undefined if unknown.
name: findProvider

description: Human progress label 'current / target unit', trimming trailing .0 for whole numbers and keeping one decimal for fractional values.
name: formatProgress

description: "128 / 500 mi" — the human progress label. Unit is optional.
name: formatProgress

description: Presentational helper: formats a goal's remaining amount (rounded, optional unit) for the GoalCard 'to go' label.
name: formatRemaining

untestabilityReason.justification: One-line display formatter with no branching beyond the shared tidy pattern; visually covered by the GoalCard component scenarios.

description: Presentational helper: formats a goal's remaining amount (rounded to one decimal, optional unit) for the GoalCard 'to go' label.
name: formatRemaining

untestabilityReason.justification: One-line display formatter with no branching beyond the shared tidy rounding pattern; visually covered by the GoalCard scenarios.

description: Browser-preview fallback that returns a check-in fixture selected by the `?s=` scenario query param, defaulting to the Rich fixture.
name: fromFixture

untestabilityReason.justification: Reads the preview URL params to pick a fixture; a browser-preview substitute for the native backend.

description: Browser-preview fallback dashboard source: reads the ?s scenario query param from window.location and returns the matching named fixture, defaulting to the Primed fixture.
name: fromFixture

untestabilityReason.justification: reads window.location.search to select the preview fixture

description: Browser-preview fallback that returns the goals fixture selected by the ?s= query param, defaulting to the Rich fixture.
name: fromFixture

untestabilityReason.justification: Selects a preview fixture from the URL query string; browser-only glue with no production logic.

description: Browser-preview fallback that selects a bundled recovery fixture from the ?s= scenario URL param (defaulting to Rich) and attaches the deep-link positions.
name: fromFixture

untestabilityReason.justification: Reads window.location URL params and picks a bundled fixture; browser/preview glue exercised via scenarios.

description: Browser-preview fallback: read the ?s= query param and return the matching in-memory timeline fixture, defaulting to the Rich scenario.
name: fromFixture

untestabilityReason.justification: Reads the ?s= fixture query param and returns a static in-memory fixture.

description: Browser-preview fallback (no Tauri): returns the fixture named by the ?s= query param, or the Rich default when absent/unknown.
name: fromFixture

untestabilityReason.justification: Reads window.location.search to pick a preview fixture; a thin preview-only shim with no in-process aggregation.

description: Loads recent check-in Mood rows via the native Tauri `get_checkin` command and derives the metabar label and default morning/evening part-of-day; returns null when not under Tauri.
name: fromNative

untestabilityReason.justification: Invokes a native Tauri command and reads window.location; only meaningful inside the desktop shell.

description: Dashboard data source under Tauri: dynamically imports the Tauri core API and invokes the native get_dashboard command (reads local SQLite), returning null when not running under Tauri.
name: fromNative

untestabilityReason.justification: dynamically imports the Tauri API and invokes the native get_dashboard command; returns null outside Tauri

description: Loads goals from the native Tauri get_goals command, deriving the metabar date label and the composer-open deep link; returns null when not under Tauri.
name: fromNative

untestabilityReason.justification: Wraps the Tauri invoke/import and window.location read; only meaningful inside the native runtime.

description: Invokes the Tauri `get_recovery` command and stitches the raw read plus its factors and actions into a flat RecoveryReadFull, or returns null when not running under Tauri.
name: fromNative

untestabilityReason.justification: Tauri IPC boundary (dynamic import + invoke); exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Load the timeline under Tauri: invoke get_timeline for the four raw activity sources, group them via buildTimeline, and seed the initial type/query from the URL; returns null when not running under Tauri.
name: fromNative

untestabilityReason.justification: Wraps the Tauri invoke('get_timeline'); returns null when not under Tauri and delegates all shaping to the unit-tested buildTimeline.

description: Server data loader: reads recent Mood rows (most recent first) via Prisma for the check-in history; empty in production so the Check-in page shows day-one.
name: getCheckins

untestabilityReason.justification: Prisma/SQLite read boundary; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Server-only read that loads all ProviderConnection rows via Prisma and maps each through the pure toConnectionRow helper to the client-safe ConnectionRow shape.
name: getConnectionRows

description: Server data loader that reads the most-recent DailyBriefing plus its ordered Vitals and latest Workout via Prisma, returning the console's full payload (nulls/empties when the DB is empty, i.e. the day-one state).
name: getDashboard

untestabilityReason.justification: Prisma/SQLite database read boundary; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Server data loader: reads every Goal in display order via Prisma; empty in production so the Goals page shows the day-one empty state.
name: getGoals

untestabilityReason.justification: Prisma/SQLite read boundary; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Server data loader: reads the most-recent RecoveryRead with its ordered factors and actions via Prisma; null in production so the Recovery Center shows day-one.
name: getRecovery

untestabilityReason.justification: Prisma/SQLite read boundary; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Server loader for the Activity Timeline: reads the four sources (Workout, DailyBriefing, Mood, Weight) via Prisma and hands them to the pure buildTimeline for normalization + grouping. A thin boundary read; empty DB yields the day-one empty state.
name: getTimeline

untestabilityReason.justification: Thin Prisma/SQLite read boundary that delegates all in-process shaping to the unit-tested buildTimeline helper; the read itself is exercised via the timeline-rich-week app scenario.

description: Server loader for a single timeline entry detail: parses a composite entry id (via the unit-tested parseEntryId), reads the one Workout / Mood / Weight / DailyBriefing row via Prisma by kind, and returns it tagged with its ISO timestamp (via briefingOccurredAt for briefings); null on malformed id, unknown kind, missing row, or a workout lacking occurredAt.
name: getTimelineEntry

description: Server data loader: reads every TrendMetric (one chart per metric×range) with its ordered TrendPoints via Prisma; empty in production so the Trends page shows day-one.
name: getTrends

untestabilityReason.justification: Prisma/SQLite read boundary; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Check-in: recent Mood rows (most recent first).
name: get_checkin

description: Dashboard: most-recent briefing + its ordered overnight vitals + latest workout.
name: get_dashboard

description: Goals: every goal in display order.
name: get_goals

description: Recovery: the latest read plus its contributing factors and suggested actions.
name: get_recovery

description: Timeline: the four activity sources; the TS layer groups them into days.
name: get_timeline

description: Trends: every metric chart + its points; the TS layer stitches points on.
name: get_trends

description: Classifies a goal as 'complete' (current >= target) or 'active'; a bad target reads as active.
name: goalStatus

description: A goal is complete once current reaches (or passes) its target.
name: goalStatus

description: Groups normalized timeline entries into newest-first days, each day's entries newest-first, attaching a relative day label keyed off the single newest entry across the set.
name: groupByDay

description: Group already-normalized entries (any order) into newest-first days, each day's entries also newest-first. The relative labels key off the single newest entry across the whole set.
name: groupByDay

description: Infers morning (before noon) vs evening (noon on) from an hour; falls back to morning for an out-of-range hour.
name: inferPartOfDay

description: Morning before noon, evening after. Hours outside 0-23 fall back to morning.
name: inferPartOfDay

description: Inserts a new goal appended at the list end (ord = current count), mirroring dueLabel from cadence.
name: insert_goal

description: Inserts a new mood (check-in) row from an already-validated draft.
name: insert_mood

description: True only when a recovery factor is 'strong' (mint), so the eye lands on steady/strained signals that hold recovery back.
name: isPositiveState

description: A factor counts as positive (mint) only when it's strong; steady and strained read in ink / signal so the eye lands on what's holding recovery back.
name: isPositiveState

description: Detects whether the check-in surface is running inside the native Tauri shell (vs. the browser preview) by checking for `__TAURI_INTERNALS__` on window.
name: isTauri

untestabilityReason.justification: Branches on the Tauri runtime global; its result depends entirely on the native shell being present.

description: Detects whether the app is running under Tauri by probing for the __TAURI_INTERNALS__ global on window.
name: isTauri

untestabilityReason.justification: Probes the Tauri runtime via a window global; no deterministic logic to unit-test.

description: Top-level check-in data loader: returns native Tauri data when available, otherwise the browser-preview fixture.
name: loadCheckin

untestabilityReason.justification: Dispatches between the native Tauri read path and the browser-preview fixture path.

description: Dashboard data loader: returns the native Tauri dashboard read when available, otherwise the browser-preview fixture, so the ported UI is unaware of the source.
name: loadDashboard

untestabilityReason.justification: delegates to the Tauri native read with a browser-preview fixture fallback

description: Loads the goals data, preferring the native Tauri source and falling back to the fixture in the browser preview.
name: loadGoals

untestabilityReason.justification: Thin async selector between the native and fixture sources; behaviour depends on the runtime, not testable logic.

description: Recovery Center data entry point: returns the native Tauri read, falling back to the bundled fixture loader when not running under Tauri (browser preview).
name: loadRecovery

untestabilityReason.justification: Dispatches between the Tauri-native and browser-fixture data sources; exercised via app scenarios rather than a unit test.

description: Timeline data entry point: return the native (Tauri) result when available, otherwise fall back to the browser-preview fixture.
name: loadTimeline

untestabilityReason.justification: Native-or-fixture entry point wiring fromNative()/fromFixture() together with no in-process logic of its own.

description: Trends data source: returns the native Tauri result, falling back to a browser-preview fixture when not running under Tauri.
name: loadTrends

untestabilityReason.justification: Bare boundary dispatch between the native loader and the fixture fallback; no branching logic of its own.

description: Build-script entrypoint invoking tauri_build::build().
name: main

untestabilityReason.justification: binary/build entrypoint

description: Desktop binary entrypoint delegating to the library run().
name: main

untestabilityReason.justification: binary/build entrypoint

description: Prisma seed entrypoint (npm run db:seed). Intentionally a no-op in this project: production starts empty and each CodeYam scenario carries its own seed payload.
name: main

untestabilityReason.justification: Scaffolded Prisma seed script, no-op for production; scenario seeding goes through the CodeYam seed adapter.

description: Maps a SQLite row to a DailyBriefing struct.
name: map_briefing

description: Maps a SQLite row to a Workout struct.
name: map_workout

description: Masks an API key for display, keeping only the last four characters (fully masked when four or fewer).
name: maskKey

description: Merges the static provider catalog with stored ConnectionRow[] into view-model rows (connected/active flags); an error-status row is surfaced but not counted as connected; catalog order is preserved.
name: mergeCatalog

description: Builds a check-in's one-line summary from its present energy / mood word / note fields.
name: moodSummary

description: e.g. "Energy 4 · Steady · Slept well". Only present fields appear.
name: moodSummary

description: Inert placeholder callback passed as the check-in form's onLogged handler while the parent refresh is deferred.
name: noop

untestabilityReason.justification: inert no-op placeholder callback

description: Inert no-op placeholder callback passed to the console's deferred coach/setup triggers.
name: noop

untestabilityReason.justification: inert no-op placeholder callback

description: Narrows an arbitrary string to a known TrendRange, defaulting to 'weekly' so a stray ?range= value never leaves the switcher blank.
name: normalizeRange

description: Narrow an arbitrary string to a known range, defaulting to "weekly" so a stray ?range= value can never leave the switcher in an empty state.
name: normalizeRange

description: Opens (creating the app-data dir) the wellframe.db SQLite database and applies the schema, returning a Connection.
name: open_db

untestabilityReason.justification: Opens the app-data SQLite DB via the Tauri path resolver; needs the runtime.

description: Parses a composite timeline entry id ('workout-3') into its kind and numeric db id for the detail route; returns null on a malformed id or unknown kind.
name: parseEntryId

description: Parse a composite entry id ("workout-3") back into its kind + numeric id for the detail route. Returns null on a malformed id.
name: parseEntryId

description: Fraction complete of a goal (current/target) clamped to 0-100; degrades to 0 for a non-positive target or NaN/infinite inputs.
name: progressPct

description: Fraction complete, clamped to [0, 100]. A zero or negative target degrades to 0% rather than dividing by zero or reporting Infinity. NaN inputs → 0.
name: progressPct

description: Maps a trend range key (weekly/monthly/yearly) to its human title; passes unknown keys through unchanged.
name: rangeLabel

description: Human label for a range key (drives the switcher chips).
name: rangeLabel

description: Word for a 1-5 check-in rating (Very low … Excellent); null renders as an em dash.
name: ratingLabel

description: Word for a 1-5 rating; null → "—".
name: ratingLabel

description: Reads the most-recent daily briefing row (ordered by date), or None when empty.
name: read_briefing_latest

description: Reads all daily briefing rows for the timeline.
name: read_briefings_all

description: Reads all goal rows in display order (ord ASC, id ASC).
name: read_goals

description: Reads all mood rows, most recent first (backs timeline and check-in).
name: read_moods

description: Reads a recovery read's suggested-action rows, ordered by ord.
name: read_recovery_actions

description: Reads a recovery read's contributing-factor rows, ordered by ord.
name: read_recovery_factors

description: Reads the latest recovery read row (ordered by date), or None when empty.
name: read_recovery_latest

description: Reads all trend metric rows ordered by range then ord.
name: read_trend_metrics

description: Reads all trend point rows ordered by ord.
name: read_trend_points

description: Reads all vital rows ordered by ord.
name: read_vitals

description: Reads all weight rows for the timeline.
name: read_weights

description: Reads the latest workout row (ordered by id), or None when empty.
name: read_workout_latest

description: Reads all workout rows for the timeline.
name: read_workouts_all

description: Computes the SVG stroke-dashoffset that encodes a 0-100 readiness score on the dial ring (full ring at 100, empty at 0), clamping out-of-range or NaN scores so the arc is always valid.
name: readinessDashOffset

description: stroke-dashoffset for a score. The score is clamped to [0, 100] (NaN -> 0) so an out-of-range reading can never produce a negative or overlong dash.
name: readinessDashOffset

description: Human day label for a timeline entry relative to the newest entry's day (Today / Yesterday / 'Wed Jul 2'), derived from the data's newest timestamp rather than the wall clock so seeded scenarios render stable labels.
name: relativeDayLabel

description: Human day label relative to the newest entry's day (the timeline's "now"), never relative to the wall clock — so a seeded scenario always renders the same labels. The newest day is "Today", the one before "Yesterday", and anything older is "Wed Jul 2".
name: relativeDayLabel

description: Amount of a goal still to go (target - current), never negative for an over-shot goal.
name: remaining

description: Amount still to go. Never negative — an over-shot goal reports 0 remaining.
name: remaining

description: Pure resolution of a connect attempt: validates provider/method/input then maps the method to the status and status-line detail to persist, or an error. The deterministic stand-in for the real handshake; no side effects.
name: resolveConnection

description: Circumference (2πr) of a goal progress ring for a given radius.
name: ringCircumference

description: Circumference of the progress ring for a given radius.
name: ringCircumference

description: stroke-dashoffset for a goal ring at a completion percentage: full ring at 100, empty at 0, clamped so a stray value can't produce a negative or overlong dash.
name: ringDashOffset

description: stroke-dashoffset for a completion percentage: a full ring at 100, an empty ring at 0. The percentage is clamped so a stray value can't produce a negative or overlong dash.
name: ringDashOffset

description: Internal helper: rounds a number to 2 decimal places for stable SVG path coordinates in buildChartGeometry.
name: round

description: Internal helper: rounds a number to 2 decimal places for stable SVG path coordinates in buildChartGeometry.
name: round

description: Tauri builder entrypoint: registers the invoke handlers and runs the app.
name: run

untestabilityReason.justification: Builds and runs the Tauri app.

description: Server Action: makes one AI provider the sole active coach (clears others, sets this one) in a transaction, then revalidates the dashboard.
name: setActiveCoach

untestabilityReason.justification: Server Action performing a Prisma transaction + revalidatePath; the one-active-coach invariant is exercised via a persistence probe

description: Human label for a recovery-factor state (strong/steady/strained); unknown states pass through.
name: stateLabel

description: Human label for a factor state; unknown states pass through unchanged.
name: stateLabel

description: Server Action: validates a check-in (via validateCheckinInput), writes a Mood row (also read by the Activity Timeline), and revalidates /checkin and /timeline. The pure decision logic is validateCheckinInput, which is unit-tested.
name: submitCheckin

untestabilityReason.justification: Server Action performing Prisma create + revalidatePath; decision logic is validateCheckinInput, unit-tested.

description: Persists a validated check-in draft via the native Tauri `submit_checkin` command and dispatches `wf:data-changed` on success; a local no-op in the browser preview.
name: submitCheckin

untestabilityReason.justification: Writes through a native Tauri command and fires a window event; inert with no persistence in the browser preview.

description: Write command: opens the app-data DB and persists an already-validated check-in (mood) row.
name: submit_checkin

untestabilityReason.justification: Tauri command that opens the app-data SQLite DB.

description: Internal helper: rounds to one decimal and trims a trailing .0 so whole numbers render without decimals in formatProgress.
name: tidy

description: Trim trailing ".0" so whole numbers read as "128" not "128.0", but keep one decimal for fractional progress ("12.5").
name: tidy

description: Extracts the HH:MM mono time stamp from an ISO datetime for the timeline's left time gutter and the entry-detail metabar.
name: timeLabel

description: Short mono time stamp, e.g. "07:14".
name: timeLabel

description: Pure mapper that narrows a raw ProviderConnection DB row's string columns to the typed ConnectionRow unions and drops the numeric id.
name: toConnectionRow

description: Validates + normalizes a check-in submission: requires a valid part of day, a valid ISO timestamp, and at least one signal (a rating or mood word); clamps ratings. Shared by the form and the submitCheckin action.
name: validateCheckinInput

description: Validate + normalize a check-in submission. Requires a valid part of day, a valid ISO timestamp, and at least one signal (a rating or a mood word) so an all-blank submission can't be logged. Ratings are clamped to 1-5.
name: validateCheckinInput

description: Validates the typed value for a connect method (non-empty/long-enough API key; URL or host:port for local/MCP endpoints), returning an error string or null. OAuth needs no input.
name: validateConnectInput

description: Validates + normalizes a new-goal form submission: trims text, defaults an unknown category to 'habit', coerces numerics, rejects an empty title or non-positive target. Shared by the composer and the createGoal action.
name: validateGoalInput

description: Validate + normalize a new-goal form submission. Pure so the create form and the server action share one source of truth and it's unit-testable. Trims text, defaults an unknown category to "habit", coerces numeric fields, and rejects an empty title or a non-positive target.
name: validateGoalInput

description: Builds a body-weight reading's one-line summary (value + unit), appending the trend delta only when present.
name: weightSummary

description: e.g. "154.2 lb · ▼0.4". Delta is appended only when present.
name: weightSummary

description: Rolls present check-in ratings into a single 0-100 wellbeing read, inverting soreness and stress so low values read as high wellbeing; null when nothing is rated.
name: wellbeingScore

description: Roll the present ratings into a single 0-100 wellbeing read. Positive fields (energy, sleep) count as-is; inverted fields (soreness, stress) are flipped so low soreness reads as high wellbeing. Returns null when nothing is rated.
name: wellbeingScore

description: Builds a workout's one-line summary by joining its present distance / pace / vertical / duration stats with a middle dot, skipping missing fields.
name: workoutSummary

description: ── one-line summary builders ─────────────────────────────────────────────── Join the present workout stats with a middle dot, e.g. "8.2 mi · 8:42 · 1,240 ft".
name: workoutSummary

description: A single trend chart: a soft-filled sparkline over a hairline baseline with the metric label, latest value + delta, x-axis bucket labels, and a one-line read. Geometry comes from the pure trends helpers; mint line when improving, signal-blue when declining.
name: TrendChart

description: The Weekly/Monthly/Yearly switcher for the Trends surface (the page's primary interaction); disables ranges with no data so the user can never land on a blank view. Active range and setter are owned by TrendsConsole.
name: TrendRangeSwitcher

description: The Trends surface (desktop port): loads every metric chart and a Weekly/Monthly/Yearly range switcher that re-scopes which charts render (the primary interaction). Owns the selected-range view state locally; shows the day-one empty state when there is no history.
name: TrendsConsole

description: Day-one empty state for the Trends surface: serif verdict, plain-language copy, and the connect-a-source / view-timeline entry paths.
name: TrendsEmpty

description: Native Tauri loader: invokes get_trends, stitches each metric's points onto it by metricId (a flat-model JS join), and reads the initial range from the URL. Returns null when not running under Tauri so the fixture fallback takes over.
name: fromNative
